description: A bent H₂O molecule with CPK colouring. Rotate it to explore the 104.5° bond angle, switch between ball-and-stick and space-filling models, and toggle a colourblind-safe palette.

A procedural caffeine model with a fused xanthine ring, four nitrogens, two carbonyl oxygens, and three methyl groups. Rotate it to discuss molecular structure, switch model styles, highlight the ring scaffold, and toggle a colourblind-safe palette.

A procedural WGS84-oblate Earth globe from Natural Earth 1:10m physical vectors, with coupled UTC time flow, date/time-aware terminator guide, subsolar/midnight markers, axial tilt, graticule guides, NASA night lights, Blue Marble clouds, and true-scale NASA/GEBCO terrain displacement plus relief shading.
attribution: Physical vectors: Natural Earth public domain; night lights, cloud composite, topography, and GEBCO bathymetry relief: NASA Earth Observatory
